name: Traditional Espresso
description: The traditional coffee made with hot water and ground beans

name: American Espresso
description: Diluted espresso, less intense than traditional

name: Iced Espresso
description: Drink made with espresso and ice cubes

name: Coffee with Milk
description: Half traditional espresso with steamed milk

name: Latte
description: A shot of espresso with double the milk and creamy foam

name: Cappuccino
description: Drink with equal parts espresso, milk and foam

name: Macchiato
description: Espresso mixed with a little hot milk and foam

name: Mocaccino
description: Espresso with chocolate syrup, a little milk and foam

name: Hot Chocolate
description: Drink made with chocolate dissolved in hot milk and coffee

name: Cuban Espresso
description: Iced espresso drink with rum, cream and mint

name: Hawaiian
description: Sweet drink made with coffee, coconut milk and whipped cream

name: Arabian
description: Drink prepared with Arabic coffee beans and spices

name: Irish
description: Drink based on coffee, Irish whiskey, sugar and whipped cream
